summary: Completed comprehensive testing of SGMD (Brazilian Government Change Management Calendar) application. All core features working correctly including authentication, CRUD operations, ITIL fields, filters, navigation, and CSV export.
passed_tests: Login page loads with Gov.br styling (#1351B4 primary, #071D41 dark header)
Login with admin@sgmd.gov.br / admin123 works correctly
Dashboard loads with GovHeader, metrics cards, calendar, and sidebar
Create new change with all ITIL fields (tipo_mudanca, categoria_itil, prioridade, risco, numero_rfc, justificativa, plano_rollback, janela_manutencao, aprovador, servicos_impactados)
Change appears in calendar after creation with correct styling
View change details modal shows all ITIL fields correctly
Edit change functionality works (title, status, priority updates)
Status filter works (todos, planejada, aprovada, em_execucao, concluida, cancelada, emergencial)
Tipo filter works (todos, infraestrutura, sistemas, sapiens)
Calendar navigation works (prev/next month, today button)
CSV export button works with success notification
Logout button works and redirects to login
Error handling for invalid login credentials
Backend API authentication flow (login, logout, get user info)
Backend CRUD operations for changes with all ITIL fields
Backend error handling (unauthorized access, invalid data)
